rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Coleman Company, Inc' Responses To General Order 129 Standard Interrogatories To Defts
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, September 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff interrogatories from defendant Coleman Co., Inc. is granted. Defendant has thirty days to provide verified responses. Plaintiff's request that the hearing on any dispositive motions filed by defendant in asbestos cases before this court be stayed until 60 days after defendant has provided verified responses is granted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The last meet and confer letter sent by plaintiff's counsel was sent to defendant's prior counsel who had substituted out of the case and not to defendant's new counsel. It appears that, had the letter been sent to new counsel, the motion would not have been necessary. If any party requests a hearing on this motion, the hearing will be at 10:45am, not 9am. = (220/HEK)
